name: EXPAND TECNOLOGIA E INFORMÁTICA
notes:
We have a selective peering policy requiring a minimum of 10 Mbps of in-continent traffic destined to or through your network.

We require an up-to-date peeringdb entry for all public peering requests, including exchange information with properly formatted public fabric addresses, asns, and noc/peering contact information.

We ask that peers also maintain their private peering facilities, as we use this information for private peering (PNI) targeting.
